  1. Home
  2. Paper Products
  3. Postcards

Custom Postcards

Full-Color Postcards 

 
  • Product Overview
  • Common Uses

* Please note that if you are electing for professional design help with your postcards, we will charge a $60 an hour setup fee. *

Product Specs

Postcards are digitally printed on high-quality 12.4 pt, 120 lb. coverstock paper and are available in either a gloss or matte coated finish.   The finished size for each of your postcards will be (h x w) 4.00" x 5.625"

Artwork

Artwork Guidelines

Vector-based file types will print best, such as .eps or .ai (Adobe Illustrator) — with fonts converted to outlines. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

Color Match Proof System

If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your postcards. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

Production Times

Production Time Tables

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

1 Business Day Priority:

Timelines can be tight. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option. 

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

2 Business Days Express:

Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal for you!

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

5 Business Days Saver:

If you’re not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

Payment

All postcards must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog..

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order.

Shipping

General Shipping Guidelines

If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the business card cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after initial scheduled delivery.

International shipping Notes:

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team.

Shipping Maps

Postcards/strong>

This product is made in our Minnesota facility only.

Shipping Methods

We offer the following shipping methods for custom postcards:

Standard ( 3–5 Business Days )
Three Day ( 3 Business Days )
Two Day ( 2 Business Days )
Overnight ( 1 Business Day )
UPS Overnight AM
Economy Shipping If choosing economy shipping please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery. Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5 - 10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to.

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300 and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

Business Uses: 

  • Direct Mail Marketing
  • Event invitations 
  • Appointment reminders
  • Thank you notes
  • seasonal greetings 
  • Brand Awareness
  • Real Estate Marketing 

Personal Uses:

  • Travel Souvenirs
  • Wedding Save the Dates 
  • Party or Event Invites 
  • Holiday Cards
  • Announcements 
  • Thank You Cards
  • Art and Photography


Stay connected with customers, friends, and family using high-quality custom postcards from Banners.com, printed on thick, durable cardstock with vibrant gloss or matte finishes to make your message stand out. Perfect for direct mail marketing, event invites, thank you notes, and more, these postcards offer flexible turnaround options and professional support to help you create eye-catching results that leave a lasting impression.

Product Options
4.25" x 5.88"

For files larger than 60 MB please call for instructions to insure the fastest service.

    Add to Cart

    More About Custom Postcards Return to Top

    Stay connected with friends, family, and customers with custom postcards from Banners.com. Custom postcards are the perfect complimentary piece to add to any e-commerce package, hand out for promotional advertisements, or send to friends and family for invitations and holiday well wishes.

    Our post cards are printed on thick, durable cardstock and are available in either a gloss or matte finish and can be single or double-sided print. Get started on your custom postcards today by uploading your postcard design.

    * Please note that if you select for professional design help with your business card design, we will charge a $60 per hour set up fee*

    Postcard Templates
       
    EPS 4.00" x 5.625" Postcard EPS Template
    PDF 4.00" x 5.625" Postcard PDF Template

    Why Choose Banners.com for Custom Postcards

    Whether you’re promoting your business, sharing a special event, or sending a personalized message, Banners.com is your go-to source for custom postcard printing. With high-quality materials, vibrant colors, and options for double-sided postcard printing, we ensure your postcards make a lasting impression.

    From customized postcards to personalized postcards tailored to your needs, we provide flexible solutions that help you stand out. Pair your postcards with our custom posters or custom made premium photo tiles for a cohesive branding experience.

     

    Unmatched Customer Service

    At Banners.com, customer satisfaction is at the heart of everything we do. First-time customers like Tori appreciate our dedication, sharing: "This is my first time and I was pleasantly surprised with such great communication and customer service! I can't wait to see my products! Based on the customer service, I will definitely use them again!"

    Here’s how we make the process of custom postcard printing effortless:

    • Live Design Support: Collaborate with our experts to create the perfect customized postcards for your business or event.
    • Free Proofing Services: Review and refine your postcard design with free digital proofs to ensure it’s exactly how you envisioned.
    • Fast Turnaround & Shipping: On a tight timeline? We offer quick production and delivery options so you can receive your custom postcards when you need them.
    • Premium Materials: Choose from high-quality cardstock and finishes for durable, professional results.
    • Satisfaction Guarantee: We’re confident you’ll love your postcards. If not, we’ll make it right.

    Frequently Asked Questions

    What size are your personalized postcards?

    Our personalized postcards measure 4.0" × 5.625" (H × W).

    What’s the difference between matte and gloss postcards?

    Matte has a smooth, non-shiny finish for a classic, premium look, while gloss is shiny and vibrant for extra color pop.

    How thick are your postcards?

    Our postcards are printed on 12.4 pt cover stock (thickness is measured in “points”—higher points mean thicker paper).

    How do I design a postcard?

    You can upload your completed design and we’ll print it, or start from a template in our design tools.

    What information should I include on a postcard?

    For business postcards, include your business name, website, phone/email, and a clear offer or call to action, plus optional branding like a logo or tagline. For personal postcards, include your name, a message, and optional photos.

    Why Choose Banners.com?

    Customer Service

    Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

    Fast Turnaround

    Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

     

    Quality Products

    Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

    Live Order Tracking

    Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.

metaDescription: Design and print custom postcards for business or personal use in minutes. Our postcards a printed in full color on premium cardstock. Available in glossy or matte finish.
